REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Owlin — Armored Tank (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:20+9=29 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 58 damage. Owlin — Armored Tank HP: 1/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Owlin — Armored Tank.
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (1/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Owlin — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
